final:
module johnson_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            out <= {~out[0], out[3:1]};
        end
    end
endmodule
